title: crepidomanes campanulatum
intro: Crepidomanes campanulatum, also known as the bell-shaped creeping fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crepidomanes campanulatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
